doc_title_en: Notice regarding revision to FY2026/3 year-end dividend forecast (dividend increase)

key_facts.reason_jp: 連結業績が前回予想を上回ったため、配当性向15%に基づき増額

summary_en: Annual dividend raised to ¥57/share (from ¥50 prior forecast) for FY2026/3. Year-end dividend increased ¥7 to ¥42/share. Payout ratio target 15% per Rolling Vision 2025 mid-term plan. Increase driven by consolidated earnings exceeding prior guidance.
summary_jp: 2026年3月期年間配当を57円/株（前回予想50円）に増額。期末配当を35円から42円に7円増加。配当性向目標15%（Rolling Vision 2025）。連結業績が前回予想を上回ったため。
tag_en: Dividend Hike - FY2026/3 - Annual ¥57/share (vs ¥50 prior) - 15% payout ratio target
tag_jp: 配当増額 - 2026年3月期 - 年間57円/株（前回予想50円）- 配当性向15%
